# Ajolote Labs

> Forward-deployed AI infrastructure for operations-heavy companies. We embed
> engineers in your stack, build a unified data brain (an MCP-based context
> layer that AI agents can read and act on), deploy AI employees against it,
> then upskill your team to run them.

## Services

- The Brain — unify every tool you already pay for into one interface AI can read and act on. Privacy, consent, and audit wired in from day one.
- AI Employees — agents that do real work across operations: booking, forecasting, reconciling, negotiating, reporting. Run 24/7 on the brain, in natural language.
- Power Users — your team learns to command, customize, and deploy agents themselves. Ajolote supports as you grow the system.

## Engagements

- [Cross-Border Spirits](https://ajolotelabs.ai/#cases) — Trade & distribution. Built the infrastructure and brain that detects inefficiencies in the cross-border supply chain CPG brands face exporting spirits to the US. $500K+ revenue unlocked, 3 AI agents deployed, 30 automations.
- [Loyalty Platform](https://ajolotelabs.ai/#cases) — Enterprise B2B. Led an AI-native turnaround: deployed a company brain where AI agents detect new workflows, automate them, and compound in capability. 46 automations, 40 hours saved/month, 3 AI agents deployed.
